title: Department of Construction and Technical Affairs - About
content:
Department of Construction and Technical Affairs - About

Purpose of the Department of Construction and Technical Affairs;

To ensure that the construction, survey-project, technical maintenance-repair, building inspection and site investigations of our university are organized in a healthy way, daily services are carried out and finalized.

Duties and Responsibilities;

To coordinate the project design of buildings and facilities in line with the development of our university,

To prepare feasibility reports for all kinds of works that require technical examination and project design,

Preparing tender files, making and finalizing the tender,

To carry out technical supervision of the tendered works, to issue progress payments, to accept the finished works,

To carry out maintenance and repair works of the buildings, and to ensure the management and administration of technical personnel,

To determine all kinds of infrastructure needs and to carry out activities to ensure uninterrupted provision,

To prepare, present and follow up the investment budget of the University,

To eliminate and follow up all problems in the functioning of buildings and facilities.
